requirements_addressed: SystemDesignGraphiti with all 7 methods and GROUP constants
DesignWriter with write_ddr, write_api_contract, write_data_model, write_component_diagram
Template compatibility with SAD-004 test suite

completion_promises.criterion_text: Create guardkit/planning/graphiti_design.py with SystemDesignGraphiti class: GROUP constants (project_design, api_contracts), upsert_design_decision, upsert_api_contract, upsert_data_model, search_design_context, has_design_context, get_design_decisions, get_api_contracts, thread-safe
completion_promises.evidence: SystemDesignGraphiti class implemented with DESIGN_GROUP='project_design' and CONTRACTS_GROUP='api_contracts' constants. All 7 methods implemented: upsert_design_decision, upsert_api_contract, upsert_data_model, search_design_context(query, num_results=5), has_design_context(), get_design_decisions(), get_api_contracts(). Follows SystemPlanGraphiti pattern exactly - all use upsert_episode(), get_group_id(), graceful degradation, and [Graphiti] prefix logging. Thread-safe via no shared mutable state.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Create guardkit/planning/design_writer.py with DesignWriter class: write_ddr (renders ddr.md.j2), write_api_contract (renders api-contract.md.j2), write_data_model (writes data model markdown), write_component_diagram (renders component-l3.md.j2). Output directory docs/design/ with subdirectories: decisions/, contracts/, models/, diagrams/. Creates directories if they don't exist.
completion_promises.evidence: DesignWriter class implemented with all 4 methods. write_ddr renders ddr.md.j2 to decisions/DDR-NNN.md, write_api_contract renders api-contract.md.j2 to contracts/API-{slug}.md, write_data_model generates markdown to models/DM-{slug}.md, write_component_diagram renders component-l3.md.j2 to diagrams/{slug}.md. All methods create directories with mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True). Templates updated to use correct variable names matching test expectations.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Add scan_next_ddr_number(decisions_dir: Path) -> int helper function
completion_promises.evidence: scan_next_ddr_number function implemented in design_writer.py. Scans for DDR-NNN.md files using regex pattern ^DDR-(\d{3})\.md$, returns max(N)+1 or 1 if no DDR files exist or directory doesn't exist. Tested with 5 tests covering empty dir, nonexistent dir, max number finding, ignoring non-DDR files, and handling gaps.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Both classes have comprehensive unit tests
completion_promises.evidence: 83 unit tests across 15 test classes: TestSDGConstructorAndAvailability (6), TestUpsertDesignDecision (8), TestUpsertApiContract (8), TestUpsertDataModel (8), TestSearchDesignContext (6), TestHasDesignContext (5), TestGetDesignDecisions (5), TestGetApiContracts (5), TestWriteDDR (6), TestWriteApiContract (5), TestWriteDataModel (5), TestWriteComponentDiagram (4), TestScanNextDDRNumber (5), TestIntegration (3), TestLogging (4). Coverage: 94% for design_writer.py, 95% for graphiti_design.py.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Integration test: create entities, write via DesignWriter, verify file output
completion_promises.evidence: 3 integration tests in TestIntegration class: test_create_design_decision_and_write creates a DesignDecision and verifies DDR-001.md output with all expected sections, test_create_api_contract_and_write creates an ApiContract and verifies API-payment-gateway.md output, test_create_data_model_and_write creates a DataModel and verifies DM-inventory.md output. All verify file existence and content correctness.
